Nodes.Text: Stock and Forex Data and Realtime Quotes
The SDK requires **Go version 1.18 or above**.
Resolve all the SDK dependencies, using the `go get` command.
The following section explains how to use the m1forgefinanceapis library in a new project.
- Add the following lines to your application's `go.mod` file:

```go
replace m1forgefinanceapis => ".\\Random Directory" // local path to the SDK

require m1forgefinanceapis v0.0.0
```
- Resolve the dependencies in the updated `go.mod` file, using the `go get` command.

Steps.Title: Add SDK as a Dependency to the Application

Nodes.Text: The SDK can be configured to use a different environment for making API calls. Available environments are:
Fields
The following parameters are configurable for the API Client:

Data: Configurable http client options like timeout and retries.

Nodes.Text: The API client can be initialized as follows:
1Forge Finance APIs Client
The gateway for the SDK. This class acts as a factory for the Controllers and also holds the configuration of the SDK.
Controllers
* [Forex]($e/forex)
The instance of the `ForexController` class can be accessed from the API Client.
forexController := client.ForexController()

UsageExample.HttpCallTemplate: {"method":"GET","url":"{% case environment %}{% when "production" %}https://1forge.com/forex-quotes{% else %}envrr{% endcase %}/quotes{% capture inline_query_capture_876234 %}{% endcapture %}{% if inline_query_capture_876234.size > 0 %}?{% endif %}{{ inline_query_capture_876234 | remove_first:'&' }}","headers":{% capture header_capture_9023987234 %}{% endcapture %}{{ '{' }}{{ header_capture_9023987234 | remove_first:',' }}},"body":{{ '{' }}"type":"none"}}

Response.Name: response200
Response.Description:
A list of quotes

This endpoint returns an [```ApiResponse```]($h/__additional_documentation/Utilities/ApiResponse) instance.

Nodes.Title: Get a List of Symbols for Which We Provide Real-Time Quotes
Get a List of Symbols for Which We Provide Real-Time Quotes
Nodes.Name: GetAListOfSymbolsForWhichWeProvideRealTimeQuotes
Nodes.ResponseText: This method returns an [```ApiResponse```]($h/__additional_documentation/Utilities/ApiResponse) instance. The `Data` property of this instance returns the response data which is of type []string.

UsageExample.EndpointName: Get a list of symbols for which we provide real-time quotes
UsageExample.HttpCallTemplate: {"method":"GET","url":"{% case environment %}{% when "production" %}https://1forge.com/forex-quotes{% else %}envrr{% endcase %}/symbols{% capture inline_query_capture_876234 %}{% endcapture %}{% if inline_query_capture_876234.size > 0 %}?{% endif %}{{ inline_query_capture_876234 | remove_first:'&' }}","headers":{% capture header_capture_9023987234 %},"Accept":"application/json"{% endcapture %}{{ '{' }}{{ header_capture_9023987234 | remove_first:',' }}},"body":{{ '{' }}"type":"none"}}

Response.Name: response200
Response.Description:
A list of symbols

This endpoint returns an [```ApiResponse```]($h/__additional_documentation/Utilities/ApiResponse) instance.

Nodes.Text: The following parameters are configurable for the HttpConfiguration:
Properties

Data:
Establishes network connection and caches them for reuse.
*Default*: `http.DefaultTransport`

Nodes.Text: The httpConfiguration can be initialized as follows:
The following parameters are configurable for the RetryConfiguration:
Properties

Data:
Whether to retry on request timeout.
*Default*: `true`

Interval before next retry. Used in calculation of wait time for next request in case of failure.
*Default*: `1`

Overall wait time for the requests getting retried.
*Default*: `0`

Used in calculation of wait time for next request in case of failure.
*Default*: `2`

Nodes.Text: The retryConfiguration can be initialized as follows:

```go
package main

import (
    "m1forgefinanceapis"
)

func main() {
    retryConfiguration := m1forgefinanceapis.CreateRetryConfiguration(
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithMaxRetryAttempts(0),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithRetryOnTimeout(true),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithRetryInterval(1),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithMaximumRetryWaitTime(0),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithBackoffFactor(2),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithHttpStatusCodesToRetry([]int64{408, 413, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504, 521, 522, 524, 408, 413, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504, 521, 522, 524}),
        m1forgefinanceapis.WithHttpMethodsToRetry([]string{"GET", "PUT", "GET", "PUT"}),
    )
}
```
